title: Pen Oruthi Song Lyrics Gemini
stanzas:
Pen Oruthi Song Lyrics #Gemini
#Bharathwaj #SPB

pen oruthi pen oruthi
padaithu vittai
ennidathil ennidathil
anuppi vaithaai

uyirodu enai
uzhayil yaetrinaai.

neruppukku selaikatti
anuppi vaithaai
nilavukku vanmuraigal
kattru koduthaai

en kannil yaen
oosi yaetrinaai.

brahmma oh brahmma
idhu thaguma idhu thaguma
ayyo idhu varamaa
saabamaa (2)

pen oruthi pen oruthi
padaithu vittai
ennidathil ennidathil
anuppi vaithaai

uyirodu enai
uzhayil yaetrinaai.

kangalile boutham paarthen
kannathil samanam paarthen
paarvai mattum kolaigal
seyya paarkiren

parkalilum karunai parthen
padhangalil dheivam parthen
punnagaiyo uyirai
thinna paarkiren.

puyal endru ninaithen ennai
puyal kattum kayiraai vandhaal.
malai endru ninaithen ennai
malligaiyaal malaiyai saaithaal

netri pottil ennai
urutti vaithaale.

brahmma oh brahmma
idhu thaguma idhu thaguma
ayyo idhu varamaa
saabamaa (2)
pen oruthi..

pagal ellaam karuppaai poga
iravellaam vellai aaga
en vazhvil yedhedho maatramo
ayyayyo ulaga urundai
adi vayitril suttruvadhenna
achchacho thondai
varaiyil yaerumo..

erimalaiyin kondai mele
rojaavai nattaval yaaro.
kadhal enum kanavaai vazhiye
en dhedam pugunthaval yaaro

siru siruga uyirai
parugi sendraale..

brahmma oh brahmma
idhu thaguma idhu thaguma
ayyo idhu varamaa
saabamaa (2)

pen oruthi pen oruthi
padaithu vittai
ennidathil ennidathil
anuppi vaithaai

uyirodu enai
uzhayil yaetrinaai.

neruppukku selaikatti
anuppi vaithaai
nilavukku vanmuraigal
kattru koduthaai

en kannil yaen
oosi yaetrinaai.

brahmma oh brahmma
idhu thaguma idhu thaguma
ayyo idhu varamaa
saabamaa

seo.title: Pen Oruthi Song Lyrics Gemini
seo.description: Full Pen Oruthi songs lyrics, Gemini Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: Bharadwaj, Singer(s): SPB.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Gemini, Bharadwaj, SPB, Pen Oruthi full lyrics, Gemini songs lyrics, Pen Oruthi lyrics snippets, Pen Oruthi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Pen Oruthi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pen Oruthi'?

'Pen Oruthi' conveys deep emotions of love and longing, expressing how the beloved has a profound impact on the singer's life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Gemini?

In Gemini, the song reflects the romantic feelings of the protagonist, showcasing his affection and emotional connection with his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary SPB and composed by Bharadwaj.

When was 'Pen Oruthi' released?

'Pen Oruthi' was released on April 12, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the film Gemini, the song Pen Oruthi serves as a poignant expression of love, capturing the essence of romantic longing. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, beautifully articulate the emotions of the protagonist as he reflects on his beloved. With SPB's soulful rendition and Bharadwaj's melodic composition, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. It resonates with anyone who has experienced the depths of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pen Oruthi is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the legendary SPB's soulful voice and Bharadwaj's enchanting composition, this song from the film Gemini resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu that evoke nostalgia and romance.
stanzaMeanings: You sent a girl to my place after creating her.
You have taken me with your life.
You sent a fiery message and taught the moon its praises.
Why did you pierce my eyes?
Brahma, oh Brahma, is this right, is this right? Oh, is this a curse?
You sent a girl to my place after creating her.
You have taken me with your life.
I saw wonders in my eyes, I saw equality in my sight, I only see actions through my gaze.
I saw compassion in the skies, I saw God in the paths, I see smiles that feed life.
I thought of a storm, and if it comes, it will bind me. I thought of a garland, and if it is made of jasmine, it will be worn.
If you twist me in a pot, I will be trapped.
Brahma, oh Brahma, is this right, is this right? Oh, is this a curse?
You sent a girl...
All day it goes black, all night it turns white. Is there any change in my life? Oh, will the world roll in my stomach?
Who is the one who brings the rose on the mountain of thorns? Who enters my dreams through love?
If small lives run away, they will be lost.
Brahma, oh Brahma, is this right, is this right? Oh, is this a curse?
You sent a girl to my place after creating her.
You have taken me with your life.
You sent a fiery message and taught the moon its praises.
Why did you pierce my eyes?
Brahma, oh Brahma, is this right, is this right? Oh, is this a curse?
